title: LinkedIn Company Scraper Input
description: Configure which LinkedIn company pages to scrape. Direct company URLs work best (public guest pages); name search requires LinkedIn login and is best-effort.

companyUrls.title: LinkedIn Company URLs
companyUrls.description: List of LinkedIn company profile URLs to scrape directly. Example: https://www.linkedin.com/company/microsoft/

companyNames.title: Company Names to Search (beta)
companyNames.description: Company names to search on LinkedIn. Note: LinkedIn search requires login, so this is best-effort. Direct company URLs are recommended.

maxResults.title: Max Results per Search
maxResults.description: Maximum number of company profiles to scrape per company name search query.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for scraping. Residential proxies are strongly recommended for LinkedIn.
